curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies starknet/compiler/rust/src/lib.rs (compileSierraToCasm function). The fix adds overflow-checks=true to Cargo.toml and wraps the compilation call in panic::catch_unwind() in lib.rs. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern - lib.rs is the only Rust source file in the module. The Go wrapper compiler.go calls the Rust FFI but does not itself contain the overflow vulnerability. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow confirmed by CWE-190, advisory description explicitly stating 'integer overflow', and the patch enabling runtime overflow detection.
